items.content_statement: Name and recognize the six basic emotions
items.classification_rationale: Factual knowledge of emotion categories - propositional content with clear correct answers

items.content_statement: Recognize that emotions are natural, important, and can change
items.classification_rationale: Conceptual understanding about the nature of emotions - propositional knowledge

items.content_statement: List things they like (interests) and things they do well (strengths)
items.classification_rationale: Procedural skill with clear performance criteria - can be demonstrated on demand

items.content_statement: Practice positive self-talk
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation that operates by default across contexts - requires observation over time

items.content_statement: Recognize when things are hard and practice asking for help
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when situations call for it - involves reasoning about difficulty and appropriate responses

items.content_statement: Use verbal and nonverbal language to communicate different emotions
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when situations call for emotional communication - no fixed prerequisite sequence

items.content_statement: Identify strategies that help them to stay calm when experiencing challenges
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when challenging situations arise - reasoning about appropriate strategies

items.content_statement: Identify a short-term goal/hope and name people and/or resources that can help them accomplish the goal
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability for goal-setting and resource identification - occasion-prompted reasoning skill

items.content_statement: Show initiative and independence when making choices
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation that operates by default across contexts - requires observation over time

items.content_statement: Express their needs and wants
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when situations call for self-advocacy - occasion-triggered skill

items.content_statement: Give examples of when they, or others, have been courageous or tried hard to do something
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability to recognize and articulate examples of courage and effort - occasion-prompted reasoning

items.content_statement: Recognize that all people have some needs in common
items.classification_rationale: Propositional knowledge about human commonalities - factual content to be understood

items.content_statement: Understand that people can have different feelings and emotions
items.classification_rationale: Conceptual understanding about emotional diversity - transferable concept about human variation

items.content_statement: Identify when something is fair or unfair
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when situations call for fairness evaluation - reasoning across multiple lenses

items.content_statement: Show care and respect for others
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation enacted across contexts by default - quality exists only in ongoing behavior

items.content_statement: Explain why they are grateful for someone or something in their life
items.classification_rationale: Procedural skill with clear criteria for explanation quality

items.content_statement: Identify words and actions that may support or hurt the feelings of others
items.classification_rationale: Factual knowledge about impact of specific behaviors - propositional content about cause and effect

items.content_statement: Develop friendship skills by initiating and responding to verbal and nonverbal communication attempts from others
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - friendship skills operate as ongoing social capacity across contexts

items.content_statement: Name the actions of a helpful teammate or collaborative group member
items.classification_rationale: Occasion-triggered analytical skill - deployed when observing or evaluating group dynamics

items.content_statement: Communicate needs, wants, and ideas in a positive way, including using I statements
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - positive communication operates as ongoing interpersonal capacity

items.content_statement: Actively listen when others are talking and practice waiting their turn to talk
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - active listening and turn-taking operate as ongoing social practices

items.content_statement: Ask for help with a personal or social problem as needed
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - help-seeking operates as ongoing capacity for self-advocacy

items.content_statement: Express anger and/or frustration without harming others, self, or property
items.classification_rationale: Sustained default orientation - emotional regulation operates as ongoing capacity across contexts

items.content_statement: Share independent thoughts and ideas with classmates
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when classroom situations call for contribution - occasion-triggered skill

items.content_statement: Describe a problem as little or big
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability for problem assessment - occasion-triggered when problems are encountered

items.content_statement: With help, brainstorm strategies to solve a problem
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability for solution generation - occasion-triggered when problems need solving

items.content_statement: Think about and begin to reflect on personal actions and behaviors
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability for self-reflection - occasion-triggered when reflection is prompted

items.content_statement: Name how others in our school, home, and community provide help
items.classification_rationale: Factual knowledge about support systems - propositional content to be held

items.content_statement: Name simple rules about personal health and safety
items.classification_rationale: Factual knowledge about health and safety rules - propositional content to be held
